entities.description: As a subsection of 'BOOKINDEX' and the second stage of the proposed BookIndex construction process, this section details the method for extracting fine-grained entity knowledge from hierarchical tree nodes and refining it using a novel gradient-based entity resolution technique.
The specific two-stage process step that follows Tree Construction, focusing on extracting entity knowledge and performing resolution within the BookIndex framework.
A novel algorithmic method described in this section used to refine extracted entity knowledge by resolving ambiguities or duplicates based on gradient optimization.

relations.description: The concept of 'Graph Construction' is the primary topic and subject matter of section 4.3.
The method 'Gradient-based Entity Resolution' is a key component and technique detailed within section 4.3.
